patch.value: S5: coverage migration + bare-core vs installed-plugin e2e verification for the audit extraction

Close the program with verification: (1) migrate/replace the unit+e2e specs that covered the four commands and six flags so the 100% literal all-src coverage gate stays green after ~2,146 LOC leave src/ (vitest.config.ts include/exclude reconciliation; package-side specs cover the moved logic — worker-bridge runCli pattern per pm-kvd0; watch pm-qfdd in-process flag leakage); (2) e2e matrix: bare core has NO audit commands/flags (help, completion, contracts, MCP tools/list, unknown-option guidance all clean) AND pm install governance-audit restores the full surface with identical output (README verify commands + golden JSON comparisons); (3) Windows + macOS legs: windows-regression job is the Windows oracle, nightly is the sole macOS oracle — enumerate every failed leg if red; (4) changelog: close items with accurate type/tags, regen LAST (pnpm changelog:pm), checkout .managed-extensions.json before commit. Blocked by S4.

coverage gate green with the four files relocated; package logic covered by specs; bare-vs-installed e2e matrix green on linux + windows-regression; nightly macOS watched post-merge; changelog regenerated as the last step of the closing PR
